attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY,
WVID.BK_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_NUM_INT,
WVID.BK_VENDOR_INVOICE_NUM,
WVID.AP_VENDOR_PARTY_KEY,
WVID.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_ACCT_DT,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INVOICED_QTY,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_UNIT_PRC_AMT,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_INV_VRC_AMT,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_DOC_TYPE_CD,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_POSTED_FLG,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_LINE_DESCR,
WVID.VNDR_INV_DISTRIB_AMT,
WVID.EXPENSE_REIMBURSEMENT_TYPE_CD,
WVID.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,
WVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_KEY,
WVID.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
WVID.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
WVID.EXPENSE_REPORT_LINE_KEY,
WVID.SOURCE_DELETED_FLG,
WVID.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
WVID.SK_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
WVID.SS_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_COMPANY_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
WVID.DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
WVID.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WVID.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WVID.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WVID.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_LINE_KEY ,
WVID.BK_ITEM_UNIT_OF_MEASURE_CD,
WVID.BK_VNDR_INV_DSTRBN_TRX_TYPE_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_FNCL_ACCT_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_CMPNY_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_DEPT_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_FNCL_LOC_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_PRJT_CD,
WVID.DD_INTER_CMPNY_SUBACCT_CD
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION WVID
  WHERE 
NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIBUTION NVID
                      WHERE WVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY = NVID.VENDOR_INVOICE_DISTRIB_KEY)
